channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: BTC recovery fragile, Iran war fallout to 'dominate' markets in 2026: Analyst
item.description: Fallout from the Iran war will likely weigh on markets for much of 2026, dashing hopes of rate cuts until Q3 by the earliest, the Coin Bureau's Nic Puckrin said.

item.title: Bitcoin price falls under $71K as US-Iran war tensions spark sell-off
item.description: Bitcoin price sold off as negotiations to end the US-Iran war broke down and the Strait of Hormuz returned to the spotlight.

item.title: Justin Sun calls out WLFI, platform threatens lawsuit in response
item.description: Sun criticized the WLFI platform over long token lockup periods and accused it of having blacklist functions at the smart contract level.

item.title: Our BTC Breakeven ARR is ~2.05%. If Bitcoin grows faster than that over time, we can cover our dividends indefinitely without issuing new $MSTR shares. Track it in real time on our site. $STRC - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE1fTXZnVG1SYlFpaDhWalpzMTB1UWZuNkU4b0tSOTVyeVhWOEhvaXRkdU5TQlc1RGtkTmo3UWZnSXVTS1habkdsOXFNRlhmSEQ1OVhwdHV2dmtLcEU?oc=5" target="_blank">Our BTC Breakeven ARR is ~2.05%. If Bitcoin…

item.title: CFTC Chair Mike Selig argues for agency's 'exclusive regulatory authority' in prediction markets fight: State of Crypto
item.description: Selig said states do not have the ability to police prediction market providers, echoing his agency's stance as it pursues court cases to cement its authority.

item.title: DeFi’s shakeout is a stress test, not a death sentence
item.description: Novozhenov argues that despite lingering governance, security and regulatory hurdles that have shuttered several protocols, DeFi remains resilient.

item.title: Want Claude Opus AI on Your Potato PC? This Is Your Next-Best Bet
item.description: A developer distilled Claude Opus 4.6's reasoning into a local Qwen model anyone can run. The result is Qwopus—and it's surprisingly close to the real thing.

item.title: Strategy's Michael Saylor signals impending Bitcoin purchase
item.description: The company has completed 105 Bitcoin transactions since 2020 and is playing contrarian as it continues accumulating BTC via corporate debt and equity financing

item.title: 🚨 REKT: Bitcoin user G.Love lost 5.92 BTC after downloading a fake Ledger app from the Apple App Store, with funds quickly laundered through a CEX. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5FY1hpekRZN1FzWnIzUG9Fa1RYZmVybU53bWhjTkM3U2hQT3B2LVFEdXBxcE1JS3Fxd0NLLTl5bW50M3pqQjE1VU9yeHFvVUlqMWR5VUNDbE41T3RHQTVYR25kNFA?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 REKT: Bitcoin user G.Love lo…

item.title: Bitcoin may be forming a base at $65,000 as 'paper hands' have been flushed out
item.description: Jurrien Timmer, director of global macro at Fidelity Investments, says strong earnings are helping markets absorb geopolitical shocks, despite ongoing risks.

item.title: Oil futures up 7% on Hyperliquid as Trump orders Naval blockade of Hormuz
item.description: Oil prices spiked on the Hyperliquid platform after President Donald Trump ordered a naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz

item.title: Market makers are fleeing public blockchains to protect their secret trading playbooks
item.description: Crypto trading is almost entirely public. One startup thinks it has borrowed an idea from Wall Street that could change that.

item.title: Bitcoin miners face a tougher road to the 2028 halving
item.description: Bitcoin miners are heading toward the 2028 halving with thinner margins, tighter power markets and a growing need for capital discipline.

item.title: Bitcoin slips below $71,000 as Trump orders U.S. to join Iran in blockade of Strait of Hormuz
item.description: "Effective immediately, the United States Navy ... will begin the process of blockading any and all ships trying to enter, or leave, the Strait of Hormuz," said the president in a social media post.

item.title: Bitcoin analysts flag triggers for a massive surge to $88,000 even as war risks linger
item.description: Key factors, such as ETF flows, macro factors and on-chain supply favor a rally in bitcoin even as war risks linger.

item.title: There’s a Way to Make Bitcoin Safe From Quantum Without a Fork, Researchers Say
item.description: A new proposal suggests Bitcoin users could defend against future quantum attacks using a transaction design that works within the network’s existing rules.

item.title: Super PAC tied to Tether makes first ad buy from firm founded by Tether's U.S. CEO
item.description: The Fellowship PAC spent $300,000 with Nxum Group that was co-founded by Bo Hines, the chief of Tether's U.S. arm and former adviser to President Donald Trump.

item.title: Banks, corporates in Europe ‘actively selecting partners’ for stablecoin push
item.description: Stablecoin adoption in Europe is shifting from strategy to execution, with demand increasingly driven by real-world needs.

item.title: Commodity traders are getting debanked due to Iran war, pushing them to rely on stablecoins
item.description: As banks retreat from trade finance amid Iran-linked risk fears, non-bank lenders and traders are increasingly turning to stablecoins for settlement, according to Haycen’s Luke Sully.

item.title: Tron’s Justin Sun slams Trump-backed WLFI for treating users as ‘personal ATM’ after $75 Million DeFi loan
item.description: Once WLFI's largest outside backer, Sun is going public days after the Trump-family venture borrowed $75 million against its own token on a DeFi protocol advised by one of its own insiders.

item.title: Trump token sees whale accumulation ahead of Mar-a-Lago gala; senators raise questions over event
item.description: Some whales have withdrawn large amounts of TRUMP tokens to private wallets, according to Lookonchain.

item.title: Why North Korea keeps stealing billions in crypto — out in the open
item.description: As North Korea's infiltration tactics grow more sophisticated, security experts say the crypto industry needs to understand what sets the regime apart from every other state-backed hacker — and why that difference makes it a dangerous thre…

item.title: US down to 'last chance' to pass CLARITY Act before 2030: Lummis
item.description: Staunch crypto advocate Senator Cynthia Lummis said the country should not risk its financial future by further delaying the CLARITY Act.

item.title: Polymarket bets removed from Google News after brief appearance: Report
item.description: Polymarket links briefly appeared under mainstream outlets in Google News results for event-driven queries but were later removed.

item.title: quick history lesson: bitcoin logo was spotted in a 1991 game the lore goes deeper than you think - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTFBKQWJ5ZUt2Q3gtYjU5X2ozMEUxOWFSWjd4RHhfd2lZUWNPbW9fSWltZWRWdEFmcW9jaldVZW13UTNMTGZDQTM1Y0JPQnhvR2N0bGhqc0oxNUczY2xv?oc=5" target="_blank">quick history lesson: bitcoin logo was spo…

item.title: ✅BITCOIN MAY GO QUANTUM-SAFE WITHOUT ANY UPGRADE A new proposal introduces “Quantum Safe Bitcoin (QSB),” designed to stay secure “even against powerful quantum computer running Shor’s algorithm.” It works within Bitcoin’s current system ( - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE9zendDQm5JdEEtODFYNU1VVFJ1RmpQblN5UElLeWFTbTZBcUg2eHpmU2gzNFRKU3k1b1h3Njg4NWJHeUxtYnBKSjVPdU5ld256c1pKQjVqLWxERDdkWkZKLQ?oc=5" target="_blank">✅BITCOIN MAY GO QUANTUM-SAFE WITHOUT…

item.title: ⚠️ WARNING: Bitcoin now has more longs than shorts. Crowded longs increase the risk of a long squeeze. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1zMTJVLTNEbmtEUUZCeUg1d0I5MEdWa2hKQW0wRkpwdTU0Y0l6dEtmMWlrUktpcmxNVjhvMVBqUEFTQUw4RFdfanVfUXh3QU54bWVQaFJTQTJPeUFjZmhrRGFB?oc=5" target="_blank">⚠️ WARNING: Bitcoin now has more l…

item.title: I have always been an ardent supporter of President Trump and his crypto friendly policy. As an early supporter who invested heavily in World Liberty Financial, I did so because I believed in the vision that was presented to the public: a decentralized finance pl - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE0tVmliRW51T1BSQnNVeVRrWHB5M0VyME1hWER6a05iVXNtc3owRGlmdlZzWVdDb3VsWjhlZGxRWmpwZE9oUzRQNzVnSDliYk12M1hEYXJWaHFQeTRtNEhrbjNfUkU?oc=5" target="_blank">I have always been an ardent su…

item.title: Ether Machine scraps SPAC merger with Dynamix, citing market conditions
item.description: The Ethereum treasury firm aimed to launch a $1.5 billion yield-bearing ETH fund but will now halt its plans following the mutual decision to end the deal.

item.title: XRP drops to $1.33 as bitcoin weakness pulls down majors
item.description: Sudden selloff triggered liquidation-style move, with weak recovery reinforcing bearish structure despite compressed volatility setup.

item.title: Bitcoin, Ether near levels that could signal trend reversal: Analyst
item.description: Bitcoin and Ether are each less than 10% away from price levels that could signal a potential reversal in the crypto market, according to a macro analyst.

item.title: JUST IN: $115,000,000 liquidated from the crypto market in the past 60 minutes. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFAtMGRFMlZWZzE1Y3BPY19tQ2VZcF9vN2tkbWZudkh4NWhPc3N4ME1NdGdiN0d5OU5JZzRSVUNLQXE4RDRHQXNKUnhFSW9SbDNQdEZsWXpDVzhVdXVuekZxN2Jn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: $115,000,000 liquidated f…

item.title: Bitcoin and other cryptos fall as U.S., Iranian negotiators fail to reach war resolution
item.description: U.S. Vice President J.D. Vance said negotiations had ended after a daylong session in Pakistan, sending crypto prices down between 1.5% and 2%.

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin falls under $72,000 after Vice President JD Vance says the US failed to reach a deal with Iran during negotiations in Pakistan. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5wSFNZYmxsOG9UNDh1Nm0waXVlY1JlUzNXVFpLNGFGM0VmOU1nRllBbkc2a3pidXZUVEh0dHdQR0dDelZNWlFETUdhUVVaUVhiZ0NfYjVzd1NxWUhXX0M4TnJn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin falls under $72,0…

item.title: US President Trump faces renewed backlash as Trump-linked tokens crash
item.description: Democratic lawmakers and crypto investors characterized crypto projects launched by or tied to Trump as scams and political corruption.

item.title: one time i was dead broke, and indebted too,, my friends bitcoin wallet was on my phone, (he had given me his passphrase a long while back to check something and had forgotten), i kept sawing deposit notifications from his wallet on my phone, I'm talking 3k - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBtV29vcGs4TVNFUFdTSndlWGdpQ2xfQlhUSmRwOUNiUnp0bDhlYk1Ka2hHcnBGdS0wdVdKOGc0Vk1jWUpPV25HR1RxN3JyTjBLZlN6RjBSQmFfZDV5dTZONTBR?oc=5" target="_blank">one time i was dead broke, and ind…

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin pumping above $73,700, nearing $74,000 👀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBFclpSbnkzeW9JOGFydEE1NXRMLU4zajZXaWczMmZZOGd5SW9SQlFSdTB5dVd3eUZVOWpMV3NvOGhIc1NHNXplcjNXWEZVVnQxakJYbFo2LU1TSm1IeW1KQWliTWJrQW8?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin pumping ab…

item.title: Crypto crashed six months ago: Have markets improved, or are bears still in charge?
item.description: The October 2025 Bitcoin and altcoin crash may have ended the bull market, but its long-term impact on market health may have been overstated.

item.title: Musk’s SpaceX holds $603 million in bitcoin despite $5 billion loss stemming from xAI
item.description: Arkham data shows 8,285 BTC in Coinbase Prime custody as the company swings from $8 billion profit to nearly $5 billion loss ahead of its IPO push.

item.title: I am a Web3 Ambassador at World Liberty Financial. There are 12 of us on the team page. 4 are named Trump. 3 are named Witkoff. The page calls us "the passionate minds shaping the future of finance." 600,000 wallets bought our memecoin. They lost $3.87 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE5OYkxla3AzalBGbFZpcDlDTjlvam5XTWl3bUdUR2R3cFg0c1lPYldDZmJmdFlnZG1sLXR2SElnSjFlM090QUZWTWZDUkladFdPNTZ2OWRkZEtQdm1PVHc?oc=5" target="_blank">I am a Web3 Ambassador at World Liberty…

item.title: Bitcoin price analysis sees new short squeeze as open interest nears $25B
item.description: Bitcoin open interest hit five-week highs while funding rates mimicked the BTC price collapse below $60,000, leading analysis to predict a new short squeeze.

item.title: Bitcoin got us to $126,000. So now we feel terrible at $72,000. But here's the thing — you own Bitcoin. I owned one Bitcoin before the rally. I owned one Bitcoin during the bear market. Same Bitcoin. Different feelings. The asset didn't change. The price did. Not - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE91OGNWdUhzV0xzOWZENTZObTZVMGI2WUFKNnA1OXFKVzNCWjRxS1B5SFd2TlZ2OGcwYUVmRVpPaFdOZXFQbmp6R24wN1o4ekF4NkNZZ2NzelhxdkxyQUo1Sw?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin got us to $126,000. So now w…

item.title: Bitcoin signals potential seller exhaustion as realized losses decline
item.description: On-chain data points to easing selling pressure, with realized losses falling and spot markets shifting toward net buying.

item.title: Signal push notifications could present privacy vulnerability, says Durov
item.description: The comments followed recent reports that law enforcement officials retrieved deleted Signal messages through device push notification logs.

item.title: The crypto honeymoon is over for now as analysts warn of a major first-quarter profit squeeze
item.description: Several major investment firms have preemptively downgraded Coinbase and other platforms as a sharp drop in trading activity and falling token prices threaten to derail upcoming first-quarter earnings results.

item.title: How U.S. sports teams can launch their fan-token strategies right now
item.description: Dreyfus, CEO of Chiliz, examines the implications of the SEC and CFTC’s recent joint guidance on digital assets and what the regulatory clarity means for the future of blockchain fan engagement.

item.title: $1.6 billion Ether Machine SPAC deal collapses over unfavorable market
item.description: The Ether Machine, an ether treasury firm, currently has more than $1 billion in ether in its treasury.

item.title: 'Not Going to Stop at Bitcoin': Morgan Stanley Weighs Tokenization, Tax Solutions in Crypto Push
item.description: Morgan Stanley’s Amy Oldenburg signaled that the Wall Street giant’s crypto journey has a long way to go.

item.title: Bitcoin, broader market flat as U.S.-Iran negotiations begin
item.description: The market rose over the week after a two-week ceasefire was announced, triggering a derivatives short squeeze that wiped out over $430 million in bearish positions.

item.title: New Tools Aim to Make AI 'Vibe Coding' Safer for Crypto
item.description: A new initiative by Matterhorn and the ASI Alliance adds auditing tools and safety checks for AI-generated smart contracts.

item.title: Economists Said AI Wouldn’t Take Jobs—Some Now Admit They Got It Wrong
item.description: A new multi-university study surveyed 69 economists, 52 AI experts, and 38 superforecasters. All three groups agree: faster AI means fewer jobs.

item.title: Reality of AI’s impact on employment clashes with C-suite optimism
item.description: While some proponents believe AI will bring about an employment boom, so far its effect has been to dampen entry-level hiring while delivering mixed results on productivity.

item.title: NEW: 🇧🇹 Bhutan has sold 70% of its Bitcoin holdings, falling from 13K BTC to less than 4K BTC. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE5XZnBDdGFpNk1zNUQ1eXdQYnB6bnpfbVlfSXNxWHNoanRyY1NIUGI1TU9LTzQtM3Fobm9LUkU0T05fUXE0TlBERkVxenIyUHA2THBZeFRfdjc0OXE2SjZkZ2NzVmdoZw?oc=5" target="_blank">NEW: 🇧🇹 Bhutan has sold 70…

item.title: Paying Iran in crypto could put shippers at sanctions risk: Chainalysis
item.description: Crypto’s transparent ledger makes sanctions evasion easier to trace, allowing authorities to track and potentially freeze illicit flows.

item.title: This is perhaps the most respected technical line in Bitcoin $BTC history. For nearly ten years, this ascending trendline has acted as the "Parabolic Guard." Every touch has historically preceded a massive expansion: • 2017: +963% • 2018: +261% • 2020: +1,1 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE9iTzZmTFc3UW5yVkRyOF9YWFc0d2w5LXVmTTROV0FmTEE2czQtdmtxbGxDaHlaTHd0QjFMT1l6bmlNZVhScXJ2Z1VSaTlMckloNVdpdXpSeUdTVkpuNkUw?oc=5" target="_blank">This is perhaps the most respected tec…

item.title: Trump-linked WLFI hits new low as token-backed loan triggers concern
item.description: WLFI fell to a record low after it was revealed that the project used billions of its own tokens as collateral to borrow $75 million in stablecoins.

item.title: 🚨 ALERT: Bullish crossover for #Bitcoin on the MACD (weekly timeframe). This does NOT mean the bear market bottom is in. It happened 2 times during the 2022 bear market too. • 1st time: -60% • 2nd time: -40% It's unlikely Bitcoin will see such a deep correct - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9vZlZwUHFGdGhLbDltRmhXdmxSeHc2VGh0WGtfQ2V0eWlkWTNKRHBzQjRMZVRyQkdVSUh3OGlodFB1Q0t4UV9jTjluMG8yZ1ZUcm5GWXFuOFByZ3l6cjJBek5B?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 ALERT: Bullish crossover for #B…

item.title: Federal court blocks Arizona crackdown on Kalshi’s event contracts
item.description: A federal judge in Arizona has temporarily barred state officials from enforcing gambling laws against Kalshi, siding with the CFTC.

item.title: Bitwise edges closer to Hyperliquid ETF launch with second amended filing
item.description: Bitwise added the ticker $BHYP and a 0.67% management fee in its latest filing, signaling a potential launch soon, according to Bloomberg's senior ETF analyst.
